title: Crispy American Quinoa Stir-fry
description: A fresh and crisp post-workout meal featuring ground cumin, a gluten-free-friendly option that's easy to prepare.
instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold water and drain well.

In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to boil. Add quinoa and stir for about 30 seconds, then reduce heat to low and cover the pan with a lid for about 15 minutes or until all the water is absorbed.
While quinoa cooks, finely chop garlic and onion; set aside.
When quinoa has finished cooking, transfer it into a large bowl and let cool. Once cooled, mix in chopped onions, garlic, olive oil, ground cumin, and salt (if using).
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the quinoa mixture to the hot pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until golden brown.
Stir in fresh cilantro leaves; mix well.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course, garnished with additional ground cumin if desired.
